title: CV
text:
Quarto

Obtained diversified professional experience of nearly 19 years ranging from technology development to financial policy design. A Computer Science Graduate. Core strength includes data analysis, trend forecasting. Programming skills in Python, MySQL, and Visual Basic. Expertise in MS Excel, MS Power Point and MS Word. Currently pursuing Masters at Boston University. A sports and entertainment enthusiast. Developed a software using PHP and MySQL to analyze English Premier League data out of passion towards football.

title: About Me
text:
Basic Information

Hello. I am Hasnat Ahsan, and I am from Bangladesh.

title: About Me
text:
Professional Status

My professional experience is diversified, rangind from technology to banking. I have completed various technical projects including telecommunication billing system migration, data center establishment etc. Besides, I have been working with financial policy making as an employee of the Central Bank of Bangladesh.

title: About Me
text:
Academics

I am a Computer Engineering graduate. I have also completed my MBA. Currently I am doing my MS in Applied Business Analytics at the Boston University.

title: Projects
text:
Billing System Migration

While I was working in Augere Wireless Broadband Bangladesh Ltd. (A WIMAX service provider in Bangladesh), I was a part of this project completion team. The agreement period between Augere and their billing system provided was over. In such a scenario, a new billing system was required to run the show. As a result, the core billing system (including unix operating system, oracle database, billing application) of Augere was migrated from one service provided to the other. This was especially a challenging project as the support from the previous operator was not present during the migration and thus, it was required to understand their overall structure of operating system, database and application.

title: Projects
section: Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) System installatioin
text:
Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) System installatioin

Bangladesh Bank established RTGS system in the country during the year 2015. I was an active participant of this project team.
